name: Eagle Eye
description: Synchronize Segment audiences to trigger behavioral actions in Eagle Eye AIR, enabling customer rewards.

connectorUrl.description: Eagle Eye URL of the Segment connector provided by your EagleEye CSM
connectorUrl.label: Connector URL

externalKey.description: Key to authenticate with the connector provided by your EagleEye CSM
externalKey.label: Connector External Key

behavioralActionTriggerReferences.description: Required if connecting to an Engage Audience. Accepts a comma delimited list of reference strings for the Behavioral Action to be executed. E.g.: A0001,P0001
behavioralActionTriggerReferences.label: Behavioral Action trigger reference

__segment_internal_engage_batch_sync.label: Indicates that this is a batched (or synced) destination on some schedule
__segment_internal_engage_batch_sync.description: Indicates that this is a batched (or synced) destination on some schedule

actions.name: Trigger Behavioral Action
actions.description: Trigger behavioral actions in AIR based on tracked events

fields.label: User identity value
fields.description: Customer wallet identity value in AIR for this event

identityValue.title: User identity value
identityValue.description: Customer wallet identity value in AIR for this event

fields.label: Wallet transaction reference
fields.description: Optional wallet transaction reference from the event triggering this Behavioral Action

walletTransactionReference.title: Wallet transaction reference
walletTransactionReference.description: Optional wallet transaction reference from the event triggering this Behavioral Action

fields.label: Behavioral Action trigger reference
fields.description: If connecting to an Engage Audience the default mapping should be left as is. This field accepts a comma delimited list of reference strings for the Behavioral Action to be executed. E.g.: A0001,P0001

behavioralActionTriggerReferences.title: Behavioral Action trigger reference
behavioralActionTriggerReferences.description: If connecting to an Engage Audience the default mapping should be left as is. This field accepts a comma delimited list of reference strings for the Behavioral Action to be executed. E.g.: A0001,P0001
